recent_excerpts: The Hacker News reports AI agents create a structural security gap: delegated actors lack continuous oversight, enabling lateral movement and privilege escalation without human…
Enterprises report a sharp rise in AI-generated phishing campaigns that craft personalized lures at scale, moving from broad sprays to 1-to-1 targeting in the last six months.
SecurityWeek argues autonomous agents — from code generators to decision-making systems — require new defense models as they act without human intervention.
